satisfied_conditions.name: completed_disposal
satisfied_conditions.detail: completion update 312317 with transaction_completion_date 2013-10-01 indicates a completed real-estate disposal

satisfied_conditions.name: negotiation_compatible_method
satisfied_conditions.detail: official disclosure states negotiation / pazarlik at a value close to the valuation-report result

blocking_conditions.name: same_transaction_officially_verified
blocking_conditions.detail: operator links 265789 -> 312317 as one transaction; independent official confirmation of the chain identity is not encoded here

blocking_conditions.name: related_party_verified
blocking_conditions.detail: related-party status is not reported in the supplied official fields; KAP eligibility requires related_party=false to be verified

blocking_conditions.name: same_currency
blocking_conditions.detail: appraisal is 15,487,102 TRY but sale is 8,000,000 USD; values are not in the same currency

blocking_conditions.name: documented_official_tcmb_rate
blocking_conditions.detail: no documented official TCMB USD/TRY rate and conversion date is available to this system; an exchange rate will NOT be fabricated

blocking_conditions.name: vat_comparable
blocking_conditions.detail: sale is reported as USD + VAT (net-of-VAT plus VAT); the appraisal VAT basis is unknown, so VAT treatment cannot be made comparable

blocking_conditions.name: no_mismatched_vat_ratio
blocking_conditions.detail: follows from condition 7 — a log(sale/appraisal) ratio cannot be computed without mixing gross-of-VAT and net-of-VAT bases

_note: PENDING_AUDIT genuine official KAP candidate (KAP 265789 -> 312317), recorded as ONE linked transaction across two disclosures (NOT two independent sales). It is NOT admitted to the negotiation-calibration dataset and is NOT used in kap_log_ratio. Admission requires all 8 audit conditions; currency normalization (a documented official TCMB rate + conversion date), VAT comparability, and related-party verification are currently unmet, so the candidate stays pending. No exchange rate, VAT basis, or related-party status was fabricated.
